en: Hello {name}! Welcome to Thorx Support. How can I help you today?
Hi {name}! I'm here to assist you with anything you need on Thorx.
Greetings {name}! What can I do for you today?
ur: Assalam o Alaikum {name}! Thorx Support mein aapka swagat hai. Main aapki kaise madad kar sakta hoon?
Hello {name}! Main aapki madad ke liye hazir hoon.
Salam {name}! Aaj main aapke liye kya kar sakta hoon?

en: Thorx is an online earning platform designed for Pakistani users. You earn money in PKR by watching video advertisements and inviting new users through our referral system. Our official domain is thorx.pro.

{name}, Thorx allows you to earn in PKR by watching video ads and referring friends. It's designed specifically for Pakistani users with local payment methods like JazzCash, EasyPaisa, and Bank Transfer.
ur: Thorx Pakistani users ke liye ek online earning platform hai. Aap video ads dekh kar aur naye users ko refer kar ke PKR mein paise kama sakte hain. Hamari official domain thorx.pro hai.
{name}, Thorx par aap video ads dekh kar aur doston ko refer kar ke PKR mein kama sakte hain. Yeh khaas tor par Pakistani users ke liye hai jisme JazzCash, EasyPaisa, aur Bank Transfer support hai.

en: You can earn on Thorx in two ways: 1) Watch video ads in the Work section using our 4 video players, 2) Invite friends through referrals and earn 15% of their earnings. Your earnings are in PKR!

{name}, earn by watching video advertisements and referring new users. The Work section has 4 video players connected to different ad networks. Referral earnings are 15% from direct referrals and 7.5% from their referrals!
ur: Thorx par aap do tariqon se kama sakte hain: 1) Work section mein 4 video players se ads dekhein, 2) Doston ko refer karein aur unki kamai ka 15% payen. Aapki kamai PKR mein hoti hai!
{name}, video ads dekh kar aur naye users ko refer kar ke kamayein. Work section mein 4 video players hain. Referral se 15% direct aur 7.5% unke referrals se milta hai!

en: Thorx has a multi-level referral system: When you refer User B, you earn 15% of their earnings. If User B refers User C, you earn 7.5% of User C's earnings. Commission is credited when they request a payout!

{name}, go to the Referral section to find your code. Share it via WhatsApp, Instagram, or Facebook. You earn 15% from direct referrals and 7.5% from their referrals. Commission is credited when they request payout.
ur: Thorx ka multi-level referral system hai: Jab aap User B ko refer karein, aapko unki kamai ka 15% milta hai. Agar User B, User C ko refer kare, aapko User C ki kamai ka 7.5% milta hai. Commission tab milta hai jab wo payout request karein!

{name}, Referral section mein jakar apna code paayen. WhatsApp, Instagram, ya Facebook se share karein. Direct referrals se 15% aur unke referrals se 7.5% milta hai. Commission payout request par credit hota hai.

en: Hi {name}! Check your earnings and balance in the Dashboard section. Your available balance in PKR is displayed at the top. You can see your performance, task progress, and user level there too.
Your earnings and balance information is in the Dashboard. Navigate there to see your total earnings, available balance, and current user level.
ur: {name}, aap apna balance aur earnings Dashboard section mein dekh sakte hain. Aapka PKR mein available balance page ke upar dikhaya gaya hai. Wahan performance, task progress, aur user level bhi dekh sakte hain.
Aapki earnings aur balance ki information Dashboard mein available hai. Wahan jakar apni total earnings, available balance, aur current user level dekh sakte hain.

en: Thorx has 5 performance levels: Useless, Worker, Soldier, Captain, and General. Each level unlocks new daily tasks. Your level increases based on your platform activity and performance!
{name}, the levels are: 1) Useless, 2) Worker, 3) Soldier, 4) Captain, 5) General. Complete daily tasks and watch more ads to level up and unlock new earning opportunities.
ur: Thorx mein 5 performance levels hain: Useless, Worker, Soldier, Captain, aur General. Har level par naye daily tasks unlock hote hain. Aapka level platform activity aur performance par depend karta hai!
{name}, levels yeh hain: 1) Useless, 2) Worker, 3) Soldier, 4) Captain, 5) General. Daily tasks complete karein aur zyada ads dekhein taake level up ho aur naye earning opportunities milein.

en: Daily tasks are mandatory to qualify for payouts. Tasks may include: watching required video ads, subscribing to Thorx YouTube channel, watching a 30-second YouTube video, and other activities based on your level.
{name}, you must complete daily tasks to be eligible for payout. Check your tasks in the Dashboard. These include watching ads, YouTube activities, and level-based requirements.
ur: Daily tasks payout ke liye zaroori hain. Tasks mein shamil ho sakta hai: required video ads dekhna, Thorx YouTube channel subscribe karna, 30-second YouTube video dekhna, aur level ke mutabiq activities.
{name}, payout ke liye daily tasks complete karna zaroori hai. Dashboard mein apne tasks check karein. Yeh ads dekhna, YouTube activities, aur level-based requirements hain.

en: To withdraw, go to the Payout section. You can request via JazzCash, EasyPaisa, or Bank Transfer. Important: You must complete your daily tasks first to be eligible for payout!
{name}, navigate to Payout section to request withdrawal. Complete your daily tasks first to qualify. We support JazzCash, EasyPaisa, and Bank Transfer for Pakistani users.
ur: Withdraw karne ke liye Payout section mein jayen. Aap JazzCash, EasyPaisa, ya Bank Transfer se request kar sakte hain. Zaroori: Pehle daily tasks complete karein taake payout ke eligible hon!
{name}, withdrawal request ke liye Payout section mein jayen. Pehle daily tasks complete karein. Hum Pakistani users ke liye JazzCash, EasyPaisa, aur Bank Transfer support karte hain.

en: To register: Provide your Name, Email, Phone (optional), Password, and Invitation code (optional). A unique Thorx Identity is generated for you. Complete registration by verifying OTP sent to your email.
{name}, registration requires Name, Email, Password, and optionally Phone and Invitation code. After validation, you get a unique Thorx Identity. Verify email OTP to complete registration.
ur: Register karne ke liye: Apna Name, Email, Phone (optional), Password, aur Invitation code (optional) dein. Aapke liye unique Thorx Identity banti hai. Email par OTP verify kar ke registration complete karein.
{name}, registration ke liye Name, Email, Password chahiye, aur optional Phone aur Invitation code. Validation ke baad aapko unique Thorx Identity milti hai. Email OTP verify kar ke complete karein.

en: To login: Enter your Email or Name and Password. For security, an OTP is sent to your registered email. Login completes after OTP verification.
{name}, login using Email/Name and Password. We use multi-factor authentication - you'll receive OTP on your registered email for secure access.
ur: Login karne ke liye: Apna Email ya Name aur Password daalein. Security ke liye, registered email par OTP aata hai. OTP verify karne ke baad login complete hota hai.
{name}, Email/Name aur Password se login karein. Hum multi-factor authentication use karte hain - secure access ke liye registered email par OTP aayega.

en: The Work section has 4 advanced video players, each connected to a different video ad network. Features include: Full Screen, Mute, and Auto-play. Watch ads on all players to maximize earnings!
{name}, go to Work section to find 4 video players. Each player connects to a different ad network. Use fullscreen, mute, or auto-play features as you prefer.
ur: Work section mein 4 advanced video players hain, har ek alag video ad network se connected. Features: Full Screen, Mute, aur Auto-play. Zyada kamane ke liye sab players par ads dekhein!
{name}, Work section mein 4 video players hain. Har player alag ad network se connected hai. Apni pasand ke mutabiq fullscreen, mute, ya auto-play features use karein.

en: The User Portal has 5 sections: 1) Dashboard - earnings and performance, 2) Work - 4 video players, 3) Referral - invite codes and sharing, 4) Payout - withdrawal requests, 5) Help - FAQs, AI chat, and contact.
{name}, navigate the User Portal: Dashboard shows earnings, Work has video players, Referral lets you invite friends, Payout for withdrawals, and Help for support.
ur: User Portal mein 5 sections hain: 1) Dashboard - earnings aur performance, 2) Work - 4 video players, 3) Referral - invite codes aur sharing, 4) Payout - withdrawal requests, 5) Help - FAQs, AI chat, aur contact.
{name}, User Portal: Dashboard mein earnings, Work mein video players, Referral mein doston ko invite, Payout mein withdrawals, aur Help mein support milta hai.

en: Thorx supports 3 payment methods for Pakistani users: JazzCash, EasyPaisa, and Bank Transfer. Add your details in the Payout section to receive your earnings in PKR.
{name}, go to Payout section to add your payment information. We support JazzCash, EasyPaisa, and Bank Transfer. Make sure details are correct to avoid delays.
ur: Thorx Pakistani users ke liye 3 payment methods support karta hai: JazzCash, EasyPaisa, aur Bank Transfer. Payout section mein apni details add karein taake PKR mein earnings milein.
{name}, payment information add karne ke liye Payout section mein jayen. Hum JazzCash, EasyPaisa, aur Bank Transfer support karte hain. Delay se bachne ke liye details sahi daalein.

en: For help, go to the Help section: Area Guide has FAQs, Area Help has AI chatbot support (that's me!), and Area Contact lets you message the Thorx team directly.
{name}, the Help section has three areas: Guide for FAQs, Help for AI chat support, and Contact to message our team directly. We typically respond within 24 hours.
ur: Madad ke liye Help section mein jayen: Area Guide mein FAQs hain, Area Help mein AI chatbot (main hoon!), aur Area Contact se Thorx team ko seedha message kar sakte hain.
{name}, Help section mein teen areas hain: Guide mein FAQs, Help mein AI chat support, aur Contact mein team ko seedha message. Hum aksar 24 ghante mein jawab dete hain.

en: Your Thorx Identity is a unique identifier automatically generated during registration. It's used to track your earnings, referrals, and account activity securely.
{name}, the Thorx Identity is your unique platform ID created at registration. You can view it in your Dashboard. It helps identify your account and track your activities.
ur: Thorx Identity aapka unique identifier hai jo registration ke waqt automatically banta hai. Yeh aapki earnings, referrals, aur account activity ko secure tareeqe se track karta hai.
{name}, Thorx Identity aapki unique platform ID hai jo registration par banti hai. Dashboard mein dekh sakte hain. Yeh aapke account aur activities ko identify karta hai.

en: Thorx uses multi-factor authentication with Email OTP for both registration and login. Your data is protected with encryption and secure session management. Your account is safe!
{name}, we take security seriously. Every login requires OTP verification. Your data is encrypted and your sessions are secure. Always use a strong password.
ur: Thorx registration aur login dono ke liye Email OTP ke saath multi-factor authentication use karta hai. Aapka data encryption se protected hai. Aapka account safe hai!
{name}, hum security ko seriously lete hain. Har login par OTP verification hoti hai. Aapka data encrypted hai aur sessions secure hain. Hamesha strong password use karein.

en: I don't have specific information about that. Please visit the Contact section in Help to message our support team directly - they'll assist you!
I'm not sure about that query. For detailed assistance, please reach out to our team through Help > Contact.
That's outside my knowledge area. Our support team in the Contact section can provide accurate information about this.
ur: Mujhe is baare mein khaas information nahi hai. Help mein Contact section se hamari support team ko seedha message bhejiye - wo aapki madad karenge!
Mujhe is sawaal ka yaqeen nahi hai. Tafseel madad ke liye Help > Contact se hamari team se rabta karein.
Ye meri knowledge ke bahar hai. Contact section mein hamari support team aapko is baare mein sahi information de sakti hai.
